CustomField.description: Displays the student’s current academic term by combining term season and year into a single readable value.
CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Current_Term_Season__c)), ISBLANK(Current_Term_Year__c) ), "", TEXT(Current_Term_Season__c) & " " & TEXT(Current_Term_Year__c) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically generated field showing the student’s current academic term (for example, “Spring 2026”).
CustomField.label: Current Term
